// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
import scala.scalanative.libc.errno.errno
import scala.scalanative.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativePtr, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class WithErrorBindingsImpl extends WithErrorBindings:
    import `WithErrorBindings$externs` as ext

    def failable(x: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Ffi.WithError[Int] =
        val retVal = ext.failable(x)
        val __errno = errno
        val __kyoResult = retVal
        new Ffi.WithError(__kyoResult, __errno)
end WithErrorBindingsImpl

object WithErrorBindingsImpl:
    import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.WithErrorBindings")
end WithErrorBindingsImpl

@extern
@link("kyo_we")
private[example] object `WithErrorBindings$externs`:
    def failable(x: CInt): CInt = extern
end `WithErrorBindings$externs`
